reasoning: The Wikipedia list currently (as of early March 2026) lists 'No' for a Herpes simplex vaccine. Without an actual vaccine, the only way the Wikipedia page would change to 'Yes' by March 22, 2026, is through uncorrected vandalism or an error, which is highly unlikely to persist on a well-maintained page.
